prophecies.q: 敦珠仁波切末法开示
prophecies.a: 「在这个末法时代，人们的修行将只剩下嘴上功夫。口诵经文而内心散乱，穿着法衣而行为放逸。上师之间互相诽谤，弟子之间争名夺利。佛法将变成装饰品，而非解脱之道。」
prophecies.q_en: Dudjom Rinpoche's teaching on the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In this degenerate age, people's practice will be mere lip service. They will recite sutras with distracted minds, wear Dharma robes but act with indulgence. Teachers will slander each other, disciples will compete for fame and profit. The Dharma will become an ornament rather than a path to liberation."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 敦珠仁波切描述的现象——修行流于形式、佛法商业化、教派纷争——在当代藏传佛教圈确有体现。但同时也有大量真修实证的上师和道场存在，不可一概而论。
prophecies.verdict_en: The phenomena Dudjom Rinpoche described — practice becoming superficial, commercialization of Dharma, sectarian disputes — are indeed observable in contemporary Tibetan Buddhist circles. However, many authentic teachers and practice centers also exist, so a blanket assessment is not warranted.
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 铁鸟飞翔与佛法西传
prophecies.a: 「当铁鸟飞翔、铁马奔驰之时，藏人将如蚂蚁般流散世界各地，佛法将传入红人之地。」
prophecies.q_en: Iron birds fly and Dharma spreads West
prophecies.a_en: "When the iron bird flies and horses run on wheels, the Tibetan people will be scattered like ants across the world, and the Dharma will come to the land of the red-faced people."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1959年中国军队进入西藏后，达赖喇嘛及数万藏人流亡印度和世界各地。此后藏传佛教确实广泛传入欧美（红人之地），飞机（铁鸟）和汽车（铁马）已成为日常交通工具。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Chinese military entered Tibet in 1959, the Dalai Lama and tens of thousands of Tibetans fled to India and around the world. Tibetan Buddhism subsequently spread widely to Europe and America ('land of the red-faced people'), and airplanes ('iron birds') and cars ('iron horses') became everyday transportation.
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 莲师预言藏地寺院兴衰
prophecies.a: 「藏地将建起无数寺院，金顶辉煌。然而僧人徒有袈裟，内心空无修证。寺院成为聚财之所，佛法沦为买卖之物。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava prophesied the rise and fall of Tibetan monasteries
prophecies.a_en: "Countless monasteries with golden roofs will be built in Tibet. Yet monks will wear robes with empty hearts and no realization. Monasteries will become places for accumulating wealth, and the Dharma will be reduced to a commodity."

prophecies.q: 莲师预言末法时代科技
prophecies.a: 「人们将用铁盒子说话，千里之外也能交谈。铁鸟将在天空飞翔，铁蛇将在大地奔驰。人们足不出户便能知晓天下之事。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava prophesied end-times technology
prophecies.a_en: "People will speak through iron boxes and converse across thousands of miles. Iron birds will fly in the sky, iron snakes will race across the land. People will know the affairs of the world without leaving their homes."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 电话（铁盒子说话）、飞机（铁鸟）、火车（铁蛇）、互联网（足不出户知天下事）均已在20世纪成为现实。虽然这些预言的具体措辞在不同伏藏版本中有差异，但核心描述与现代科技高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Telephones ('iron boxes for talking'), airplanes ('iron birds'), trains ('iron snakes'), and the internet ('knowing the world without leaving home') all became reality in the 20th century. While exact wording varies across terma versions, the core descriptions closely match modern technology.
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 莲师预言藏地劫难
prophecies.a: 「当来自北方的铁路修到拉萨之时，便是藏人流散之始。雪域将遭受巨大苦难，寺院将变为军营，经典将被付之一炬。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava prophesied Tibet's catastrophe
prophecies.a_en: "When the iron road from the north reaches Lhasa, the scattering of Tibetans will begin. The Land of Snows will suffer greatly, monasteries will become barracks, and scriptures will be set ablaze."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1950年代中国军队进入西藏后，大量寺院被毁或改作他用，经典遭焚毁。虽然青藏铁路2006年才通车，但1950年代已开始修建通往拉萨的公路。藏人从1959年起大规模流亡。预言的核心情节——北方铁路/公路与藏地浩劫——与历史事实基本吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Chinese military entered Tibet in the 1950s, numerous monasteries were destroyed or repurposed, and scriptures were burned. While the Qinghai-Tibet Railway opened in 2006, roads to Lhasa were built starting in the 1950s. Tibetans began their mass exodus in 1959. The prophecy's core elements — northern road/railway and Tibet's catastrophe — largely match historical events.
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 莲师预言末法时代道德
prophecies.a: 「父不慈、子不孝，夫妻如仇敌同住。人人只顾眼前利益，不问因果报应。食物虽多而无营养，衣裳虽华而心寒冷。朋友因利而聚，利尽则散。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava prophesied end-times morality
prophecies.a_en: "Fathers will be unkind, children unfilial, spouses will live together like enemies. Everyone will pursue immediate gain, ignoring karma. Food will be abundant but lack nourishment, clothing will be splendid but hearts will be cold. Friends will gather for profit and scatter when it is gone."

prophecies.q: 莲师预言伏藏出世
prophecies.a: 「我将法宝埋藏于山岩、湖底、虚空之中。当众生因缘成熟之时，掘藏师将应运而生，取出伏藏利益有情。每一部伏藏都是为特定时代的特定众生而设。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava prophesied the revelation of terma
prophecies.a_en: "I have concealed Dharma treasures within mountains, beneath lakes, and in the sky. When the karma of beings ripens, tertöns will appear to retrieve the terma for the benefit of sentient beings. Each terma is designed for specific beings in a specific era."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 自11世纪起，藏传佛教确实出现了数百位掘藏师（tertön），从各地取出伏藏教法。著名的掘藏师包括娘热·尼玛沃色（11世纪）、秋吉林巴（19世纪）等。伏藏传统延续至今，是宁玛派的重要教法来源。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 11th century, hundreds of tertöns (treasure revealers) have indeed appeared in Tibetan Buddhism, retrieving terma teachings from various locations. Famous tertöns include Nyangral Nyima Özer (11th century) and Chokgyur Lingpa (19th century). The terma tradition continues to this day and is a major source of Nyingma teachings.
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 时轮密续：香巴拉大战
prophecies.a: 「当世界陷入黑暗，邪恶势力统治大地时，香巴拉的第32位国王鲁陀罗转轮将率领大军从雪山后方出击，与邪恶势力进行最终决战。」
prophecies.q_en: Kalachakra Tantra: The Great Battle of Shambhala
prophecies.a_en: "When the world falls into darkness and evil forces rule the earth, the 32nd king of Shambhala, Rudra Chakrin, will lead a great army from behind the snow mountains to fight the final battle against evil."
prophecies.yearReason: 时轮密续预言香巴拉大战将在32位国王之后发生，传统推算约在公元2424年
prophecies.yearReason_en: The Kalachakra Tantra prophesies the Shambhala war after the 32nd king, traditionally calculated around 2424 CE

prophecies.q: 噶玛巴转世预言
prophecies.a: 「黑帽持有者将代代转世，直至千佛出世。他的每一世转世都将为众生的福祉而工作。」
prophecies.q_en: Karmapa reincarnation prophecy
prophecies.a_en: "The Black Hat holder will reincarnate generation after generation until the thousand Buddhas appear. Each of his incarnations will work for the welfare of all beings."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 噶玛巴转世体系是藏传佛教中最早的转世活佛制度，始于1110年的都松钦巴。至今已传承17世。第17世噶玛巴（1985年生）目前在印度。这一制度已持续近900年。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Karmapa reincarnation system is the earliest tulku (reincarnation) lineage in Tibetan Buddhism, starting with Dusum Khyenpa in 1110. It has continued for 17 incarnations. The 17th Karmapa (born 1985) currently resides in India. This system has persisted for nearly 900 years.
prophecies.yearReason: 噶玛巴转世预言自12世纪起持续应验，已传承17世
prophecies.yearReason_en: The Karmapa reincarnation prophecy has been continuously fulfilled since the 12th century, spanning 17 incarnations

prophecies.q: 宗喀巴大师：关于格鲁派前途的预言
prophecies.a: 「我的教法将在雪域广泛传播，但最终将面临巨大的考验。在最黑暗的时刻，来自北方的力量将改变一切。」
prophecies.q_en: Tsongkhapa: Prophecy about the Gelug school's future
prophecies.a_en: "My teachings will spread widely in the Land of Snows, but will ultimately face great trials. In the darkest moment, a force from the north will change everything."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 格鲁派确实成为藏传佛教最大宗派，达赖喇嘛成为西藏政教领袖。1950年中国（北方力量）入藏，1959年达赖喇嘛流亡，藏传佛教在西藏遭受严重打击。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Gelug school indeed became the largest Tibetan Buddhist sect, with the Dalai Lama as Tibet's political-spiritual leader. In 1950, China (the 'force from the north') entered Tibet; in 1959, the Dalai Lama fled into exile, and Tibetan Buddhism in Tibet suffered severe setbacks.
prophecies.yearReason: 宗喀巴预言的「北方力量」被解读为1950年中国入藏
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tsongkhapa's 'force from the north' is interpreted as China's 1950 entry into Tibet

prophecies.q: 末法时代五浊恶世
prophecies.a: 「末法之时，五浊恶世将至：劫浊——饥荒与战乱频发；见浊——邪见横行，正法不彰；烦恼浊——众生贪嗔痴炽盛；众生浊——人寿渐短，福报渐薄；命浊——非时横死者众。」
prophecies.q_en: Five Degenerations of the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In the end of the Dharma, the Five Degenerations shall arise: degeneration of the kalpa — famine and war; degeneration of views — wrong views prevail, true Dharma fades; degeneration of afflictions — greed, hatred, and delusion intensify; degeneration of beings — lifespans shorten, merit dwindles; degeneration of life — untimely deaths multiply."

prophecies.q: 香巴拉大战预言
prophecies.a: 「当世界被蛮族之王统治、正法近乎消亡之时，香巴拉第二十五代国王仁钦扎波将率领香巴拉大军，与蛮族展开最终决战。正法将由此复兴，黄金时代降临。」
prophecies.q_en: The Great War of Shambhala
prophecies.a_en: "When the world is ruled by the barbarian king and the Dharma is nearly extinct, Raudra Chakrin, the 25th king of Shambhala, will lead the Shambhala army in the final battle against the barbarian forces. The Dharma shall be restored and a golden age will dawn."
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 末法时代社会乱象
prophecies.a: 「末法时代，弟子不敬上师，子女不孝父母。盗贼横行，欺诈成风。人们以恶为荣，以善为耻。持戒者被嘲笑，破戒者受崇拜。」
prophecies.q_en: Social chaos in the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In the end of the Dharma, disciples will disrespect their teachers, children will be unfilial to parents. Thieves will run rampant, fraud will become the norm. People will take pride in evil and shame in virtue. Those who keep precepts will be mocked, while those who break them will be worshipped."

prophecies.q: 末法时代自然灾异
prophecies.a: 「末法之时，四季失序：冬雷震震，夏雪纷飞。江河泛滥，大地龟裂。瘟疫流行，人畜共殃。星辰异位，日月无光。」
prophecies.q_en: Natural disasters in the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In the end times, seasons will lose their order: thunder in winter, snow in summer. Rivers will flood, the earth will crack. Plagues will spread, afflicting both humans and animals. Stars will shift, sun and moon will lose their light."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 21世纪极端气候事件确实增多——反季节天气、洪涝干旱加剧、新冠疫情等。但「星辰异位、日月无光」等描述尚未出现。末法预言的自然灾异描述具有普遍性，各时代均可找到部分对应。
prophecies.verdict_en: Extreme weather events have indeed increased in the 21st century — unseasonal weather, intensifying floods and droughts, COVID-19 pandemic, etc. However, descriptions like 'stars shifting' and 'sun and moon losing light' have not occurred. The natural disaster descriptions in end-of-Dharma prophecies are generic enough to find partial matches in any era.
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 时轮金刚预言蛮族入侵
prophecies.a: 「蛮族之王将统一不信佛法的势力，以武力征服世界。他们将摧毁寺院、禁止修行、迫害僧众。正法几近断灭，唯有香巴拉保存法脉不绝。」
prophecies.q_en: Kalachakra prophecy of barbarian invasion
prophecies.a_en: "The barbarian king will unite forces that reject the Dharma, conquering the world by force. They will destroy monasteries, prohibit practice, and persecute monks. The true Dharma will nearly be extinguished, with only Shambhala preserving the lineage unbroken."
prophecies.yearReason: 藏传佛教预言文献中提及的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Period mentioned in Tibetan Buddhist prophetic literature

prophecies.q: 时轮金刚预言正法复兴
prophecies.a: 「香巴拉大战之后，正法将重新照耀世间。人寿增至八万岁，五谷丰登，疾病消退。弥勒菩萨将降生人间，转大法轮，开启新的黄金时代。」
prophecies.q_en: Kalachakra prophecy of Dharma restoration
prophecies.a_en: "After the Great Shambhala War, the true Dharma will illuminate the world once more. Human lifespan will increase to 80,000 years, harvests will be bountiful, diseases will recede. Maitreya Bodhisattva will be born into the human realm, turn the great Dharma wheel, and inaugurate a new golden age."

prophecies.q: 莲花生大师：关于铁鸟和铁马的预言
prophecies.a: 「当铁鸟在空中飞翔，铁马在大地奔驰时，藏人将像蚂蚁一样散布到世界各地，佛法将传入红人的国度。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava: Prophecy of iron birds and iron horses
prophecies.a_en: "When iron birds fly in the sky and iron horses run on the ground, Tibetans will scatter across the world like ants, and the Dharma will spread to the land of the red people."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1959年达赖喇嘛出逃印度后，藏人流亡社区遍布世界各地。飞机（铁鸟）和火车/汽车（铁马）的出现也完全应验。藏传佛教在20世纪后半叶传入西方（红人的国度一说指西方人）。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Dalai Lama fled to India in 1959, Tibetan exile communities spread worldwide. Airplanes (iron birds) and trains/cars (iron horses) appeared as prophesied. Tibetan Buddhism spread to the West (the 'land of the red people' interpreted as Westerners) in the late 20th century.
prophecies.yearReason: 莲花生大师预言的铁鸟铁马在现代交通出现后应验，藏人流散始于1959年
prophecies.yearReason_en: Padmasambhava's iron bird/horse prophecy was fulfilled with modern transportation; Tibetan diaspora began in 1959

prophecies.q: 莲花生大师：关于伏藏师出现的预言
prophecies.a: 「在未来的每一个世纪，将有伏藏师从大地和虚空中取出我隐藏的教法。他们将在最需要的时刻出现。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava: Prophecy about the emergence of Tertons
prophecies.a_en: "In every century to come, treasure revealers will extract the teachings I have hidden in earth and sky. They will appear at the moment of greatest need."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 藏传佛教历史上确实不断有伏藏师出现，从11世纪的仁钦朗巴到20世纪的多位伏藏师。他们取出的伏藏（terma）包含经文、仪轨和预言。这一传统延续至今。
prophecies.verdict_en: Throughout Tibetan Buddhist history, treasure revealers (tertons) have indeed continuously appeared, from Rinchen Lingpa in the 11th century to multiple tertons in the 20th century. The treasures (terma) they revealed include scriptures, rituals, and prophecies. This tradition continues today.
prophecies.yearReason: 莲花生大师的伏藏师预言涵盖多个世纪，持续应验中
prophecies.yearReason_en: Padmasambhava's terton prophecy spans multiple centuries and continues to be fulfilled

prophecies.q: 莲花生大师：关于末世道德沦丧的预言
prophecies.a: 「当人们不再尊敬师长，儿女不再孝顺父母，朋友之间不再信任，人人只追求财富时，末法时代就已经到来。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava: Prophecy about moral decay in the end times
prophecies.a_en: "When people no longer respect teachers, children are not filial to parents, friends no longer trust each other, and everyone pursues only wealth, the Dharma Ending Age has arrived."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 21世纪全球性的社会信任下降、代际矛盾加剧、物质主义盛行等现象与此预言有一定吻合。但道德衰退的主张在每个时代都有人提出，难以作为预言应验的确定证据。
prophecies.verdict_en: The global decline in social trust, intensifying generational conflicts, and prevalent materialism in the 21st century somewhat align with this prophecy. But claims of moral decline are made in every era and are difficult to use as definitive evidence of prophetic fulfillment.
prophecies.yearReason: 莲花生大师关于末世道德沦丧的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Padmasambhava's prophecy about end-times moral decay has no specific date

prophecies.q: 莲花生大师：关于科技时代的预言
prophecies.a: 「在未来，人们将通过虚空传递信息，不需要使者。他们将在光的镜子中看到远方的景象。人们将骑着没有马的车辆在大地上飞驰。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava: Prophecy about the age of technology
prophecies.a_en: "In the future, people will transmit information through the sky without messengers. They will see distant scenes in mirrors of light. People will ride vehicles without horses, racing across the earth."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 无线通信（虚空传递信息）、电视/电脑屏幕（光的镜子）、汽车（没有马的车辆）在19-20世纪相继出现。莲花生大师在1200多年前的描述与现代科技惊人吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wireless communication (transmitting through the sky), TV/computer screens (mirrors of light), and automobiles (horseless vehicles) all appeared in the 19th-20th centuries. Padmasambhava's descriptions from over 1,200 years ago remarkably match modern technology.
prophecies.yearReason: 莲花生大师预言的科技在19-20世纪（约1900年前后）集中实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Technologies prophesied by Padmasambhava were realized primarily around the 19th-20th centuries (~1900)

prophecies.q: 莲花生大师：25位弟子转世预言
prophecies.a: 「我的25位心子将在未来转世，在不同的时代和地域传播密法。他们将在最需要的地方出现，引导众生。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava: Prophecy of 25 disciples' reincarnation
prophecies.a_en: "My 25 heart disciples will reincarnate in the future, spreading tantric teachings in different eras and regions. They will appear where most needed, guiding sentient beings."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 藏传佛教传统中，多位伟大上师被认为是莲花生大师25弟子的转世，如蒋扬钦哲旺波、蒋贡康楚等。转世谱系（tulku system）成为藏传佛教的核心制度之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: In Tibetan Buddhist tradition, many great masters are considered reincarnations of Padmasambhava's 25 disciples, such as Jamyang Khyentse Wangpo and Jamgon Kongtrul. The tulku (reincarnation) system became one of Tibetan Buddhism's core institutions.
prophecies.yearReason: 莲花生大师的弟子转世预言涵盖多个世纪，持续应验中
prophecies.yearReason_en: Padmasambhava's disciples' reincarnation prophecy spans multiple centuries and continues to be fulfilled

prophecies.q: 莲花生大师：关于伏藏经典《度亡经》的预言
prophecies.a: 「这部教法将在最黑暗的时刻被发现，帮助无数众生在中阴（死后中间状态）中获得解脱。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava: Prophecy about the Bardo Thodol treasure text
prophecies.a_en: "This teaching will be discovered in the darkest moment, helping countless beings achieve liberation in the bardo (intermediate state after death)."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 《西藏度亡经》（Bardo Thodol）据传由莲花生大师埋藏，于14世纪由伏藏师噶玛林巴发掘。1927年伊文思-温慈将其翻译为英文出版，成为西方最广为人知的藏传佛教文本之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Tibetan Book of the Dead (Bardo Thodol) is said to have been hidden by Padmasambhava and discovered by terton Karma Lingpa in the 14th century. Evans-Wentz translated it into English in 1927, making it one of the most widely known Tibetan Buddhist texts in the West.
prophecies.yearReason: 莲花生大师埋藏的度亡经约在1350年被伏藏师噶玛林巴发现
prophecies.yearReason_en: The Bardo Thodol hidden by Padmasambhava was discovered by terton Karma Lingpa around 1350

prophecies.q: 释迦牟尼佛末法预言
prophecies.a: 「我涅槃后，正法住世五百年，像法住世一千年，末法住世一万年。末法之时，我之教法唯余形式，修证者如凤毛麟角。然有一人发真实心修行，其功德胜正法时代千百人。」
prophecies.q_en: Shakyamuni Buddha's prophecy of the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "After my parinirvana, the True Dharma will endure for 500 years, the Semblance Dharma for 1,000 years, and the Ending Dharma for 10,000 years. In the end of the Dharma, only the forms of my teaching will remain, and genuine practitioners will be exceedingly rare. Yet one person who practices with a true heart in that age will generate more merit than thousands in the age of True Dharma."

prophecies.q: 迦叶佛时代的预言：末法时期的到来
prophecies.a: 「在释迦牟尼佛入灭后五千年内，正法将逐渐衰微。僧侣将不守戒律，信众将失去虔诚。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy from Kashyapa's era: Coming of the Dharma Ending Age
prophecies.a_en: "Within five thousand years of Shakyamuni Buddha's passing, the true Dharma will gradually decline. Monks will not observe precepts, and devotees will lose their piety."
prophecies.yearReason: 佛教末法时代的预言按传统推算约在释迦牟尼入灭后2500-5000年
prophecies.yearReason_en: The prophecy of the Dharma Ending Age is traditionally calculated to be 2500-5000 years after Shakyamuni's parinirvana

prophecies.q: 弥勒佛降世预言
prophecies.a: 「在未来无量劫之后，弥勒菩萨将从兜率天降临人间，在龙华树下成佛，三转法轮，度化无量众生。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of Maitreya Buddha's descent
prophecies.a_en: "After immeasurable eons, Maitreya Bodhisattva will descend from Tushita Heaven to the human realm, achieve Buddhahood under the Naga Tree, turn the Dharma wheel three times, and liberate countless beings."
prophecies.yearReason: 弥勒降世的时间在佛教传统中以劫计算，无法折算为公历年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: The timing of Maitreya's descent is calculated in Buddhist kalpas and cannot be converted to calendar years
